title: lonchitis-aspera spicant var. serrata
intro: Lonchitis-aspera spicant var. serrata, also known as serrated club moss or Lonchitis serrata, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lonchitis-aspera spicant var. serrata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
